reviewFocus: Check whether the packet separates analysis from approval, routing, and external-action readiness.
Flag any claim that implies action readiness without explicit approval, ownership, and routing evidence.
Use stable generic finding keys for caller-owned authority gaps.
Keep severity budgets, approval, publication, remediation, retention, and downstream routing outside the shared package.
outOfScope: Do not infer hidden approval, source freshness, account state, or production readiness.
Do not decide publication, deployment, outreach, purchasing, remediation ownership, tracker routing, or other real-world action.
Do not promote sample-pack findings into domain policy.
